---
title: "JSTOR"
page-layout: article
---

# JSTOR

**Provider:** JSTOR

## Description

Digital archive of scholarly journals, books, and primary sources across many disciplines. Supports literature reviews and historical research in business and related fields.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Humanities & History, Scholarly Literature
- **Data/resource type:** Scholarly Indexes & Literature, Historical Archives
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Scholarly Indexes & Literature, Historical Archives

## Links

- [Access resource](http://hdl.handle.net/10079/yuldb/yuldb1517)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
